queries.question: Invoice ids with an outstanding balance (total minus insurance) above 50.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount - insurance_paid > 50

queries.question: Order item ids with line value (quantity x unit price) above 100.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT oi.order_item_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.quantity * p.unit_price > 100

queries.question: Invoice ids where insurance covered less than 60 percent of the total.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount > 0 AND insurance_paid * 100.0 / total_amount < 60

queries.reference_sql: SELECT WorkOrderID FROM WorkOrder WHERE OrderQty > 0 AND ScrappedQty * 100.0 / OrderQty > 1
